meaning: adj.无穷小的,极小的,无限小的n.极小量,极微量,无限小
examples: They strongly suggest that the neutrino has mass, albeit an infinitesimal amount.
The most complete work on finite and infinitesimal analysis was written in 1748 by Maria Gaetana Agnesi.
That great, infinitesimal question - I can't shake it out of my thoughts.
Many of the attacks on Patton were notable for their infinitesimal ratio of ratiocination to emotion.
They could refuse to light up for no apparent reason, because of some infinitesimal rupture in the filament.
